title: Heroes in Red: World Red Cross Day
story: Every May 8, people around the world celebrate World Red Cross and Red Crescent Day to honor amazing helpers who rush to disasters and emergencies. The Red Cross symbol means safety and help wherever you see it. Today, volunteers share stories on social media about rescuing people from floods, earthquakes, and fires. Many communities hold blood drives and first aid classes to teach kids how to help others too.
activity_question: What do Red Cross volunteers do during disasters?
activity_choices: Rush to help rescue people and provide aid
Sell emergency supplies to make money
Only work in hospitals during normal times
Paint red crosses on all the buildings
activity_answer: Rush to help rescue people and provide aid
follow_up_question: How could you help your community during an emergency?
